channel.title: PowerShell on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in PowerShell on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: Support for Python-2.7; 3.8 and PowerShell- 7.1; 7.2 will be retired on September 30, 2026
item.description:
Azure Automation will stop supporting Python 2.7, Python 3.8, and PowerShell 7.1/7.2 starting October 1, 2026. Runbooks may still run, but these runtimes will no longer receive security updates or bug fixes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: New Powershell module: Az.PostgreSQLFlexibleServer
item.description:
Azure announced the generally available Az.PostgreSQLFlexibleServer PowerShell module, a renamed module for managing Azure Database for PostgreSQL with PowerShell. It replaces the previous Az.PostgreSql-related module naming with a more streamlined experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates
